What We Do

Small Business Tax Services

Whether you file a Schedule C or run an S-Corp with payroll, we handle every form, every quarter, every year.

Schedule C Returns

Sole proprietors and single-member LLCs. We capture every legitimate deduction — mileage, home office, equipment, supplies, contractor pay, and more — so you keep more of what you earned.

S-Corp Election & 1120-S

Form 2553 election, reasonable salary analysis, K-1 distributions, and full 1120-S preparation.

Payroll Tax (941, 940)

Quarterly 941s, annual 940 FUTA, W-2s, and 1099s. ADP, Gusto, and QuickBooks Payroll supported.

Quarterly Estimated Taxes

Right-sized estimates so you avoid underpayment penalties and don't overpay the IRS all year.

Sales & Use Tax

Multi-state sales tax registration, monthly and quarterly returns, and nexus reviews.

Year-End Tax Planning

Q4 strategy sessions, retirement contribution planning, and entity-level moves that lower your bill.

Track Record

Results That Speak

Real numbers from real small businesses. No fluff.

About

Federally Licensed.
Small Business Focused.

As an Enrolled Agent, we're licensed by the U.S. Treasury to represent any taxpayer in any state — but we focus exclusively on small business. That means we know your forms, your deductions, and your industry.

Every engagement starts with a free consultation. We learn your business, review your books, and give you a flat-fee quote before any work begins.

Enrolled AgentQuickBooks ProAdvisorXero CertifiedNAEA Member

How It Works

Your Path to Filing

Three steps. Flat fees. No surprises.

1

Free Discovery Call

We review your books, your prior return, and your goals for the year — then quote a flat fee.

2

Books & Strategy

We clean up QuickBooks or Xero, capture every deduction, and plan quarterly estimates.

3

Filed & Forward

Returns e-filed on time. Year-round questions answered. Never face an IRS notice alone.

Client Reviews

What Owners Say

“
Cedar & Bloom found over $22,000 in deductions my last accountant missed — kitchen depreciation, smallware, even my POS lease. Saved me a fortune at tax time.
Restaurant Owner
Schedule C & Sales Tax
“
They walked me through electing S-Corp status and set up payroll the right way. My self-employment tax dropped by almost $9k the first year alone.
E-commerce LLC Founder
S-Corp Election & Payroll
“
As a contractor I used to dread quarterly taxes. Now I get a clean estimate every 90 days and a year-end plan. No surprises, no penalties, no stress.
Independent Contractor
